How it works Job intake Register Interest →
Voice to task — for tradies

It's not the work.
It's keeping track
of everything.

Jobs, notes, photos, invoices, certs — all over the place.
In your head, your phone, your messages… easy to miss.

Just speak it. SoleTasker turns your voice into tasks, jobs and reminders. Instantly.

If you can leave a voice message, you can use SoleTasker.

Get Early Access See how it works ↓
Speak it. Saved.
Jobs don't slip
Invoices sent
Certs on time
🇦🇺 Australian-built Founder pricing locked in
Sound familiar?
How it works

Say it.
It's captured.

No typing. No desk. Just speak — on site, in the van, between jobs. SoleTasker turns your words into tasks and job notes, assigned to you or your team, before you've moved on.

Recording
0:08
"Call Dave back about the Webb St quote — it's urgent. Assign it to Jake and flag it for follow up on the rewire job."
Captured & structured instantly
Call Dave — Webb St quote follow-up
⚠ P1 Urgent 👤 VA Follow-up 🔗 Webb Rewire

What it looks like

Tasks, job notes, and photos — captured the moment you speak.

Works for more than tasks

Speak a cert, invoice note, or email — SoleTasker drafts it, ready to copy and send. Say it once. It's written.

🔧

It's not software. It's a tool.Just another one in your pouch — but more powerful than the tape measure.

1
🎙️
Say it out loud

Walking off site. In the van. After a call. Speak naturally — SoleTasker catches it all. No typing. No stopping what you're doing.

2
📋
Tasks and notes — assigned

Your words become tasks and job notes instantly. Assign them to yourself or your team. Not in your head. Not on a scrap of paper. Right there, where you need them.

3
📎
Photos and certs — attached

Certs done, or before and after photos taken — they stay with the job. Not in your camera roll next to 4,000 others. Not in a WhatsApp thread from three weeks ago.

4
✅
Nothing falls through

The invoice follow-up. The quote you owe. The callback you meant to make. It stays there until it's done. You don't forget it because you can't — it's not in your head anymore.

Get Early Access

Australian-built · Lock in founder pricing

Sound familiar?
★  Major feature — Job intake link

Send a link.
Client fills
it in.
You're done.

Stop taking jobs over the phone and hoping you wrote everything down. Send clients a link — they fill in the address, describe the job, and upload their own photos. A fully structured job card is waiting in your dashboard before you've even called them back.

1
You send the link
One tap — SMS, WhatsApp, email. Five seconds. It's out.
2
Client fills in everything
Address, what needs doing, photos of the problem — they do the data entry at their end.
3
Structured job card waiting for you
Review it, add a voice note, and get started. All the details are already there — exactly where they need to be.

What tradies are saying
The real cost

You're not
disorganised.
You have no
system.

The work is done. The money's not coming in. Not because business is slow — because the follow-up didn't happen, the invoice didn't go out, and it all lived in your head. That's not on you. That's a missing tool.

"We don't manage your jobs.
We make sure nothing in them gets missed."

Capture it when it happens. Action it when it's due. Keep work moving. Keep cashflow moving.
Get Early Access
🧾
Invoice you forgot to send
Job done. On to the next one. Six weeks later — it hits you. That invoice never went out. That money is yours. It's just not in your account.
↑ That's real money gone
📸
Photos buried in your camera roll
Before shots, after shots, damage proof — mixed in with 4,000 personal photos. Client disputes the job. You spend an hour finding nothing. You lose the argument.
↑ A liability you can't defend
📋
Cert saved somewhere — but where
Email? Screenshot? WhatsApp? The inspector wants it now. You're digging. It's somewhere. You hope.
↑ That's a compliance risk
📝
Job details on a receipt in the van
Client name, address, what they need — written on the nearest scrap. It's in the van. Or it was. Either way, it's not where you need it right now.
↑ Every week, same story
💸
Cashflow slow for no good reason
Work's done. You're busy. But invoices are late, follow-ups slip, and money takes weeks longer than it should. You didn't fail — you just had no system.
↑ This is the fix

Built by tradies, for tradies

We lived this
problem.
So we fixed it.

We were losing money we'd already earned. Forgetting jobs. Losing certs. Invoices never going out. We built SoleTasker because every other tool felt like software. We needed something that just worked on-site.

Get it out of your head and into something you won't forget.

"Every app we tried was built for someone sitting at a desk. We're not at a desk. We're on site, in the van, on the phone. We needed something that worked the way we actually work. So we built it."

— The SoleTasker team
🔧 Tradies who've been there
